label: AKJV
name: American King James Version
notes: Official AKJV site identifies a simple word-for-word update from KJV English and public-domain dedication; use as a KJV/TR-line English surface control
license_label: Public domain per official AKJV site

label: ANDERSON
name: Anderson New Testament 1864
nt_basis: nineteenth-century Greek NT source; exact edition not stated
notes: BibleCorps repository uses the public-domain 1864 Anderson New Testament source and Internet Archive facsimile; use as a historical Greek-NT English control
license_label: Public domain by 1864 source text and repository pd marker

label: CPDV
name: Catholic Public Domain Version
notes: CrossWire module notes identify CPDV as translated from Sixtine-Clementine Vulgate editions and public domain; use as a modern Vulgate-line English control
license_label: Public domain per CrossWire CPDV module page

label: DEB
name: Dynamic English Bible 2020 Draft
ot_basis: Door43 UDB/functional translation source stack; exact Hebrew edition not stated
nt_basis: Door43 UDB/functional translation source stack; exact Greek edition not stated
notes: BibleCorps DEB README marks the text as checking/not ready; Door43 YAML metadata identifies CC BY-SA 4.0 and source relations; use as draft surface English control
license_label: CC BY-SA 4.0 per Door43 YAML metadata and BibleCorps repository

label: PET
name: Plain English Translation New Testament
nt_basis: Indonesian TSI-derived English NT; Greek source basis not stated
notes: BibleCorps PET front matter identifies CC BY-SA 4.0 and describes PET as an English translation of the Indonesian Simple Translation Bible; use as surface English NT control
license_label: CC BY-SA 4.0 per PET front matter
